💌 Dil ki Baat

Didi, aap mere liye sirf ek behen nahi — aap meri sabse badi strength hain, mera sahara hain, meri pehli dost hain. Jab bhi mushkil aati hai, aapka chehra dikhta hai toh sab theek lag jaata hai. 🌸

Is khas din par, Chota Bhai dil se dua karta hai ki aapki zindagi mein hamesha khushiyan aayein, har sapna poora ho, aur aap hamesha aise hi muskurati rahein. Aap best hain Didi! 💜

— Aapka Chota Bhai ❤️

✉️ Secret Letter

Click karke kholein 💌

Meri Pyaari Anu Didi, 🌸

Jab main chhota tha, aap hamesha mere saath khelte the, meri galtiyan maaf karti thi, aur mujhe protect karti thi. Aaj bhi aap wahi hain — mere liye sab kuch. 💜

Aapki har baat mujhe inspire karti hai. Aapki smile poori duniya roshan kar deti hai. Main chahta hoon ki aaj ka din aapke liye duniya ka sabse khoobsurat din ho.

Happy Birthday Didi! Aap hamesha khush rahein, aabad rahein, aur apne sapne poore karein. 🎂✨

Bahut sara pyaar,
Aapka Chota Bhai 🤗
